title: Flat Endings
goal: Score hook density, propose cliffhanger insertions

chapters.title: Day One
chapters.text: He woke up. He ate. He went outside. The weather was mild. He returned home.

chapters.title: Day Two
chapters.text: She walked the dog. The park was nice. Birds sang. She made tea.

chapters.title: Day Three
chapters.text: The mail came. A bill. He paid it. Dinner was pasta. He slept.

chapters.title: Day Four
chapters.text: A meeting at work. Boring notes. He drove home. Rain started.

chapters.title: Day Five
chapters.text: She read a book. Calm evening. The cat slept. She slept too.
